user.title: ZoneFlow
user.description: General settings. The weekly average temperature is read from the chosen weather entity.

zone_a.title: Zone A (no overlap)
zone_a.description: Pick the switches for the two circuits of zone A.

zone_b.title: Zone B (overlapping)
zone_b.description: The "middle" circuit waters both halves (weaker at the margin); the "edge" circuit tops up the margin half.

run_now.name: Water now
run_now.description: Immediately start a sequential watering cycle with the currently computed durations.

stop.name: Stop watering
stop.description: Stop the running cycle and close all valves.
